name: Abbreviation
goal: Render an inline abbreviation with a focusable, accessible tooltip-style expansion.
description: Inline abbreviation glyph (e.g. 'API', 'WWW') with the full text exposed via the native title tooltip and aria-label. The host carries tabindex=0 so the expansion is reachable via keyboard. Shadow DOM only because the dotted underline uses the standardised :host styling.

props.name: title
props.description: Full text the abbreviation expands to.

a11y.notes: tabindex=0 + aria-label make the expansion reachable by both screen readers and keyboard users.
